footer_description: Your trusted partner for premium car rentals in Tangier and throughout Morocco.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Our team is at your disposal to answer all your questions and support you in your rental.
contact.locationDescription: Find us directly at the Tangier TGV station to pick up your vehicle.
contact.mapHelp: Click on the map to enlarge the route

reset_email_sent: A password reset email has been sent.
reset_email_error: Failed to send the email. Please check the address.
password_updated_success: Your password has been updated successfully.
password_update_error: An error occurred while updating your password.

about_page.title: Prepare your arrival with peace of mind
about_page.subtitle: A rental service designed for you: the right vehicle, at the right time. Enjoy a simple, fast and stress-free experience — before, during and after your booking.
about_page.featured_vehicles_subtitle: Discover our selection of premium vehicles available now for your next trip.

card1.title: The right vehicle, at the right time
card1.text: Enjoy a wide selection of Volvo models suited to your needs — whether for a getaway or a business trip.

card2.title: A dedicated advisor at your service
card2.text: Before, during and after your booking, a dedicated advisor supports you for a simple, fast and stress-free experience.

card3.title: Drive freely as soon as you leave the train
card3.text: No need to wait or look for a car: your Volvo awaits you at the station, ready to take you wherever you want with style and comfort.

card4.title: Safety and reliability
card4.text: All our vehicles are checked and maintained to ensure your safety and comfort on every trip.

card5.title: Flexible hours
card5.text: Book at your own pace, pick up your car when it suits you best — no stress, no waiting.

card6.title: Delivery to your chosen location
card6.text: Have your vehicle delivered directly to the station, your hotel or the address of your choice.
